_meta.title: NIST SP 800-171 Rev. 2 — CUI Protection Requirements
_meta.description: Security requirements for protecting CUI relevant to data protection

requirements.title: Limit system access to authorized users
requirements.description: Limit information system access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, or devices (including other information systems).

requirements.title: Limit system access to authorized functions
requirements.description: Limit information system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute.

requirements.title: Create and retain system audit logs
requirements.description: Create and retain system audit logs and records to the extent needed to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity.

requirements.title: Establish and maintain baseline configurations
requirements.description: Establish and maintain baseline configurations and inventories of organizational information systems.

requirements.title: Establish incident-handling capability
requirements.description: Establish an operational incident-handling capability for organizational information systems that includes adequate preparation, detection, analysis, containment, recovery, and user response activities.

requirements.title: Test incident response capability
requirements.description: Test the organizational incident response capability.

requirements.title: Protect and control CUI media
requirements.description: Protect (i.e., physically control and securely store) information system media containing CUI, both paper and digital.

requirements.title: Sanitize CUI media before disposal
requirements.description: Sanitize or destroy information system media containing CUI before disposal or release for reuse.

requirements.title: Mark CUI media with distribution markings
requirements.description: Mark media with necessary CUI markings and distribution limitations.

requirements.title: Control access to CUI media
requirements.description: Control access to media containing CUI and maintain accountability for media during transport.

requirements.title: Control removable media
requirements.description: Control the use of removable media on information system components.

requirements.title: Protect backup CUI
requirements.description: Protect the confidentiality of backup CUI at storage locations.

requirements.title: Monitor and control communications
requirements.description: Monitor, control, and protect organizational communications at the external boundaries and key internal boundaries of information systems.

requirements.title: Employ architectural designs for security
requirements.description: Employ architectural designs, software development techniques, and systems engineering principles that promote effective information security within organizational information systems.

requirements.title: Implement cryptographic protection for CUI in transit
requirements.description: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure of CUI during transmission unless otherwise protected by alternative physical safeguards.

requirements.title: Establish and manage cryptographic keys
requirements.description: Establish and manage cryptographic keys for cryptography employed in organizational information systems.

requirements.title: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography
requirements.description: Employ FIPS-validated cryptography when used to protect the confidentiality of CUI.

requirements.title: Protect CUI at rest
requirements.description: Protect the confidentiality of CUI at rest.

requirements.title: Identify and remediate flaws
requirements.description: Identify, report, and correct information and information system flaws in a timely manner.
